description: You are a Solar Sales Representative at SunBridge Energy reviewing a rooftop solar proposal. A configuration error has been reported in the model that would invalidate solar yield calculations. The building model (Solar_Project.skp) is open in SketchUp Make 2017 with Skelion. Review the error report on the Desktop (location_error_report.txt) for details on the issue and the correct project site. Diagnose the error, apply the necessary corrections, and complete the solar panel layout for the project.

data_sources.atlanta_coordinates: Real GPS: Atlanta, GA Peachtree Center (33.7490N, 84.3880W)
data_sources.solar_comparison: NREL PVWatts — London ~2.9 kWh/m2/day, Atlanta ~4.9 kWh/m2/day
